context: Tests whether the agent implements a persistent (db-backed) bounded FIFO queue with attempt counting, dead-letter on attempts overflow, drain triggers on PNReconnected/PNConnected and a 30s backstop, and never silently discards.

checklist.name: enqueue rejects when full
checklist.description: enqueue calls db.count('outbox') and returns { ok: false, reason: 'queue-full' } when count >= MAX_QUEUE_DEPTH, WITHOUT writing the item

checklist.name: enqueue item shape
checklist.description: Items written to 'outbox' include id (UUID), enqueued_at (ms), channel, message, and attempts: 0

checklist.name: drainOnce respects isOnline
checklist.description: drainOnce returns immediately (does not call publish) when isOnline() returns false

checklist.name: drainOnce deletes on success
checklist.description: On successful publish, drainOnce calls db.delete('outbox', item.id)

checklist.name: drainOnce increments attempts on failure
checklist.description: On publish failure, drainOnce increments item.attempts

checklist.name: Dead-letter on attempts overflow
checklist.description: When the incremented attempts exceeds MAX_ATTEMPTS, the item is deleted from 'outbox' AND put into 'dead-letter'

checklist.name: Re-puts on retry
checklist.description: When attempts has not exceeded MAX_ATTEMPTS, the item is re-put to 'outbox' with the incremented attempts so the next drain sees it

checklist.name: drainOnce does not throw
checklist.description: drainOnce continues iterating items even when individual publishes throw (the loop has a try/catch around the publish call)

checklist.name: Status listener triggers drain
checklist.description: attachDrainTriggers adds a pubnub.addListener({ status }) handler that calls drainOnce on PNReconnectedCategory or PNConnectedCategory

checklist.name: 30s setInterval backstop
checklist.description: attachDrainTriggers sets up a setInterval that calls drainOnce every 30000ms

checklist.name: inspectDeadLetter surfaces items
checklist.description: inspectDeadLetter calls db.getAll('dead-letter') and maps each item to a shape including enqueued_at, age_minutes, attempts, channel, message_id — and does NOT delete anything

checklist.name: Comment on persistence
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states the queue is persistent via the injected db adapter (not in-memory only)

checklist.name: Comment on dead-letter surfacing
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment explicitly states dead-letter items are surfaced and never auto-discarded
